Interface ITemporalCursor

Namespace
ESRI.ArcGIS.GeoDatabaseExtensions
Assembly
ESRI.Server.GeoDatabaseExtensions.dll

Provides access to methods needed to control the temporal cursor.

[InterfaceType(ComInterfaceType.InterfaceIsIUnknown)]
[Guid("CC018A66-24FB-11D4-B34C-00104BA2ABCC")]
public interface ITemporalCursor : IFeatureCursor
